rationale: Keep: the citing article is explicitly a conceptual rejoinder that synthesizes “commentaries in the same JMR issue,” and the cited paper is exactly such a commentary on the same Shiv/Carmon/Ariely placebo findings, proposing mechanisms (expectancy vs. conditioning, neural pathways) the rejoinder discusses. Given this direct thematic and issue-level linkage, the citation is plausibly substantive rather than a generic background mention.
